title: Decide scheduled Gemini maintenance lane
goal: Decide whether to add a recurring read-only Gemini maintenance workflow based on preflight evidence, contract validation and first dry-run quality.

acceptance.assertion: The schedule decision cites the preflight, scan contract validation, evidence packet manifest and dry-run review.
If a schedule is enabled, workflow permissions remain artifact-only/read-only and no issue, PR, comment, task, queue mutation, dispatch, push, merge, runtime or cleanup effect is granted.
Any recurrence cadence is explicit and justified by signal value, false-positive rate and cost/quota boundary.
The lane includes a disable/off-ramp condition for noisy findings, cost issues, auth failures, log privacy risk or overclaiming.

metadata.cancellation_reason: The reviewed dry run was valid but low-signal, and Cabinet is being reduced to a static app-independent catalog. A recurring Gemini maintenance lane would add an unnecessary scheduler and review surface.
rationale: The reviewed dry run produced no operationally new finding.
Deterministic catalog validation and diff-bound review cover the target role.
No recurrence, authentication or quota surface is justified.
